name: PolicyBazaar
description: India's largest online insurance aggregator and comparison platform for health, life, car, and travel insurance
pros: Comprehensive insurance comparison across all major Indian insurers
SoftBank nearly fully exited — increasingly Indian-owned
India-listed (NSE/BSE) with Indian founders actively leading
PaisaBazaar subsidiary for loan and credit card comparison
cons: Aggressive sales follow-up calls after browsing — hard to stop
Some plans pushed for higher commission rather than best fit
Premium comparison can be misleading without reading fine print
Claim assistance quality varies by insurance partner
userComplaints: Endless spam calls from agents after entering phone number
Recommended plans sometimes prioritize PolicyBazaar's commission over customer needs
Claim support is not as helpful as promised during purchase
